textByHashes.58dcee4d7cbf8697ba02c2ef571b76086e7e55a0: It's far too cold up here. Ralos' Rise is cold, but this is something else! I have to be here though. If this beast has any connections to the Old Ones, it might also have connections to Ralos and Ranul!
textByHashes.3771d9fbbe7f855019d65ee54d31effcf15ff1b2: Me being here also keeps the dwarves a bit happier as well. They keep claiming they're the ones doing all the work and that there needs to be more humans up here helping.
textByHashes.db1c3f3dbf4fb05c3229cf0fd8c85d3de3789dbb: I don't think so. I've seen plenty of people come up here and get involved. The dwarves don't actually do any of the fighting anyway. They just go in and do some mining once the danger has passed.
textByHashes.ffb01facde97d0a80e75b80d88cfa6e39cdef0a6: Good point. Forget I said anything.
